summary: Implemented mobile touch support per design doc: responsive canvas scaling, on-screen D-pad controls (4-way for Snake/Tetris, vertical for Pong, horizontal for Breakout), restart button, mobile header adjustments. Touch controls shown only on touch/narrow devices via media query. Event synthesis dispatches real KeyboardEvent so zero game logic changes needed.
jsAdded: touch event listeners with key synthesis
healthCheck: healthy, 4 games, frontend serving updated content
